{{CargoOrgan
|name=Phantom Core - Type 0
|type=Common
|rank=red
|id=10964
|idx=157
|description=Bahamut's energy core. Lets this phantom dragon maintain physical form. At full power, enables nuclear megaflare attacks!
|skill=
|hp=2990
|def=280
|atk=233
|rush=258
|gene1=Per Dragon Form Tier, {race} HP +35
Dragon Form Tiers: 9/9
|gene2=Fire RES +120
|gene3=Free Gene Speedup (Dragon) +1h
|gene4=Fire DMG +120
|gene5={race} Fire RES +2%
|gene6=Fire DMG +2%
|gene7=Free Gene Speedup (Dragon) +3h (Awakened)
|}}
